payload.content: Both sub-agents succeeded. Now I'll move the deliverables to the session root and create the calculator as a third sub-agent.
payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_572a50789e2e4e098b57466e', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='move_file', arguments='{"dest": "generator.py", "source": "task_generator/deliverables_generator/generator.py"}'), TYPE='function'), ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_3b703c0081ec472cbb48cb91', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='move_file', arguments='{"dest": "analyzer.py", "source": "task_analyzer/deliverables_analyzer/analyzer.py"}'), TYPE='function'), ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_e59ce98eae504a4da00a7b95', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='delegate_task', arguments='{"expected_deliverable": "calculator.py script that parses string input and outputs a number", "instructions": "Create a Python script called calculator.py that:\\n- Takes a mathematical expression as a string input (e.g., \\"2 + 3\\", \\"10 * 5\\", \\"20 / 4\\", \\"15 - 3\\")\\n- Parses the string and evaluates the expression\\n- Outputs the numeric result\\n- Handle basic operations: +, -, *, /\\n- Make it runnable as a standalone script with input() to get the expression from user", "task_name": "calculator"}'), TYPE='function')]
